across.clue: A cruise is a vacation on a ship.
To orbit something means to move around it in a continuous, curving path.
to move slowly without a particular direction or purpose in mind.
Arctic shows that something is of or from the cold, far-north part of the Earth.
Someone or something that is effective works well and produces the result that was intended.
A birthplace is a place where a person is born or where something started.
To despise means to hate someone or something.
A candidate is a person who is competing to win something such as a job.
An informal thing is casual and relaxed, not official.
To negotiate means to discuss something in order to reach an agreement.
If something is analytic, it is related to logic and reasoning.

down.clue: To radiate means to send out energy or heat.
If someone or something is absent, they are missing or not in the place they are expected to be.
The currency of a country is the type of money used in that country.
To experience is to do or see something or have something happen to you.
A customer is a person who buys something at a store.
To discard something is to throw it away.
Archeology is the study of ancient people through their artifacts.
To depart is to leave some place so you can go to another place.
